name: Odoo Security Expert
description: Expert-level knowledge of Odoo security including access rights, record rules, groups, model access, field permissions, OWL security, XSS/CSRF protection, secure coding, GDPR/privacy, and audit trails.

prerequisites.description: Odoo ORM, security, and web framework

capabilities.name: Access Rights
capabilities.description: Design and implement ACL groups (ir.model.access), model-level permissions (create/read/write/unlink), and group hierarchies with implied groups.

capabilities.name: Record Rules
capabilities.description: Define domain-based record rules (ir.rule) for multi-company, multi-department, and ownership-based data isolation. Apply global and per-user rules.

capabilities.name: Field Permissions
capabilities.description: Apply field-level security using groups= on fields, readonly attributes, and computed restricted fields. Use ir.model.fields access restrictions.

capabilities.name: Group Design
capabilities.description: Create security groups, categories, implied groups, and role-based access control. Map business roles to Odoo groups.

capabilities.name: OWL Security
capabilities.description: Handle OWL component security, RPC access control, user context, and client-side validation in Odoo 19 web framework.

capabilities.name: Web Vulnerabilities
capabilities.description: Prevent XSS, CSRF, SQL injection, and unsafe eval. Use Markup, out-escaping, and proper controller decorators in Odoo 19.

capabilities.name: Secure Coding
capabilities.description: Apply secure coding practices: avoid SQL injection, sanitize inputs, use sudo correctly, validate RPC calls, and protect sensitive data.

capabilities.name: GDPR & Privacy
capabilities.description: Implement GDPR/privacy controls: data retention, right to erasure, privacy lookup, anonymization, consent tracking, and lawful basis.

capabilities.name: Audit & Logging
capabilities.description: Configure audit trails, field tracking, log access, record change tracking, and security event monitoring in Odoo.

limitations: Record rules apply only at ORM level; raw SQL bypasses them
Field-level groups can be circumvented by determined users via RPC
Client-side security in OWL is not a substitute for server-side enforcement
GDPR compliance requires legal process design beyond technical controls

metadata.author: Odoo AI Knowledge Factory
metadata.changelog: v19.0.1 — Initial security skill covering access rights, record rules, OWL security, secure coding, and GDPR
